question: What is the relative position between the cake and the desserts? Select from the following options: (A) The cake is behind the desserts. (B) The cake is in front of the desserts. (C) The cake is on the left side of the desserts. (D) The cake is on the right side of the desserts.
gold_answer: The cake is behind the desserts
answer_choices: The cake is behind the desserts
The cake is in front of the desserts
The cake is on the left side of the desserts
The cake is on the right side of the desserts
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
